title: striga multiflora
intro: Striga multiflora, also known as the African witchweed or slender witchweed, is a flowering plant species in the broomrape family Orobanchaceae. This parasitic plant has medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Striga multiflora is often used in infusions or decoctions to make teas or tinctures that are administered orally or applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
